This file documents JAKL_CCMM_AP.

Introduction

This is introduction

Overview

Class profiles

Access rights

Profiled class IRI(s) dcterms:RightsStatement
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#AccessRights
Label Access rights
Definition A statement about the access rights to the dataset.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Access rights (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/AccessRights)
    Definition: A statement about the access rights to the dataset.
    • profiles class profile Rights Statement (dcat-ap:RightsStatement)
      • profiles class profile Rights Statement (dcat-dap:RightsStatement)
        • profiles class Rights Statement (dcterms:RightsStatement)
          Definition: A statement about the intellectual property rights (IPR) held in or over a resource, a legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource, or a statement about access rights.
Usage note Use IRI identifier from the register http://purl.org/coar/access_right/.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

label

Profiled relationship IRI(s) rdfs:label
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/AccessRights.label
Label label
Definition Label of the access rights vocabulary value.
Domain Access rights
Range rdf:langString [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile label (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/AccessRights.label)
    Definition: Label of the access rights vocabulary value.
    • profiles property label (rdfs:label)
      Definition: A human-readable name for the subject.
Usage note Short label of the value from register http://purl.org/coar/access_right/. Allowed English values are 'embargoes access', 'metadata only access', 'open access' and 'restricted access'.

Address

Profiled class IRI(s) locn:Address
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Address
Label Address
Definition A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Address (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address)
    Definition: A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location.
    • profiles class Address (locn:Address)
      Definition: An "address representation" as conceptually defined by the INSPIRE Address Representation data type. The locn:addressId property may be used to link this locn:Address to other representations.
Usage note Address shall refer to the IRI identifier of an address from existing Address registry (e.g. RÚIAN for Czechia). In cases, where address identifier does not exist or cannot be used, fill address details using class attributes.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

address area

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:addressArea
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.addressArea
Label address area
Definition The name of a geographic area that groups Addresses.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile address area (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.addressArea)
    Definition: The name of a geographic area that groups Addresses.
    • profiles property address area (locn:addressArea)
      Definition: The name or names of a geographic area or locality that groups a number of addressable objects for addressing purposes, without being an administrative unit. This would typically be part of a city, a neighbourhood or village. The domain of locn:addressArea is locn:Address.
Usage note This would typically be part of a city, a neighbourhood or village, e.g. Montmartre. Address area is not an administrative unit.

administrative unit level 1

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:adminUnitL1
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.administrativeUnitLevel1
Label administrative unit level 1
Definition The name of the uppermost level of the address, almost always a country.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile administrative unit level 1 (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.administrativeUnitLevel1)
    Definition: The name of the uppermost level of the address, almost always a country.
    • profiles property admin unit level 1 (locn:adminUnitL1)
      Definition: The uppermost administrative unit for the address, almost always a country. The domain of locn:adminUnitL1 is locn:Address and the range is a literal, conceptually defined by the INSPIRE Geographical Name data type.
Usage note Best practice is to use the ISO 3166-1 code but if this is inappropriate for the context, country names should be provided in a consistent manner to reduce ambiguity. For example, either write 'France' or 'FRA' consistently throughout the dataset and avoid mixing the two. The Country controlled vocabulary from the Publications Office can be reused for this.

administrative unit level 2

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:adminUnitL2
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.administrativeUnitLevel2
Label administrative unit level 2
Definition The name of a secondary level/region of the address, usually a county, state or other such area that typically encompasses several localities.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile administrative unit level 2 (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.administrativeUnitLevel2)
    Definition: The name of a secondary level/region of the address, usually a county, state or other such area that typically encompasses several localities.
    • profiles property admin unit level 2 (locn:adminUnitL2)
      Definition: The region of the address, usually a county, state or other such area that typically encompasses several localities. The domain of locn:adminUnitL2 is locn:Address and the range is a literal, conceptually defined by the INSPIRE Geographical Name data type.
Usage note Values could be a region or province, more granular than level 1.

full address

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:fullAddress
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.fullAddress
Label full address
Definition The complete address written as a string.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile full address (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.fullAddress)
    Definition: The complete address written as a string.
    • profiles property full address (locn:fullAddress)
      Definition: The complete address written as a string, with or without formatting. The domain of locn:fullAddress is locn:Address.
Usage note Use of this property is recommended as it will not suffer any misunderstandings that might arise through the breaking up of an address into its component parts. This property is analogous to vCard's label property but with two important differences: (1) formatting is not assumed so that, unlike vCard label, it may not be suitable to print this on an address label, (2) vCard's label property has a domain of vCard Address; the fullAddress property has no such restriction. An example of a full address is "Champ de Mars, 5 Avenue Anatole France, 75007 Paris, France".

label

Profiled relationship IRI(s) rdfs:label
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.label
Label label
Definition Address label
Domain Address
Range rdf:langString [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile label (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.label)
    Definition: Address label
    • profiles property label (rdfs:label)
      Definition: A human-readable name for the subject.

locator designator

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:locatorDesignator
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.locatorDesignator
Label locator designator
Definition A number or sequence of characters that uniquely identifies the locator within the relevant scope.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile locator designator (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.locatorDesignator)
    Definition: A number or sequence of characters that uniquely identifies the locator within the relevant scope.
    • profiles property locator designator (locn:locatorDesignator)
      Definition: A number or a sequence of characters that uniquely identifies the locator within the relevant scope(s). The full identification of the locator could include one or more locator designators.
Usage note In simpler terms, this is the building number, apartment number, etc. For an address such as "Flat 3, 17 Bridge Street", the locator is "flat 3, 17".

locator name

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:locatorName
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.locatorName
Label locator name
Definition Proper noun(s) applied to the real world entity identified by the locator. The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile locator name (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.locatorName)
    Definition: Proper noun(s) applied to the real world entity identified by the locator. The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.
    • profiles property locator name (locn:locatorName)
      Definition: Proper noun(s) applied to the real world entity identified by the locator. The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.
Usage note The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building. The key difference between a locator designator and a locator name is that the latter is a proper name and is unlikely to include digits. For example, "Shumann, Berlaymont" is a meeting room within the European Commission headquarters for which locator name is more appropriate than locator.

post code

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:postCode
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.postCode
Label post code
Definition The code created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile post code (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.postCode)
    Definition: The code created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.
    • profiles property post code (locn:postCode)
      Definition: The post code (a.k.a postal code, zip code etc.). Post codes are common elements in many countries' postal address systems. The domain of locn:postCode is locn:Address.
Usage note Post codes are common elements in many countries' postal address systems. One of the many post codes of Paris is for example "75000".

post name

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:postName
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.postName
Label post name
Definition A name created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile post name (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.postName)
    Definition: A name created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.
    • profiles property post name (locn:postName)
      Definition: The key postal division of the address, usually the city. (INSPIRE's definition is "One or more names created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points."). The domain of locn:postName is locn:Address.
Usage note Usually a city, for example "Paris". Eventually name of the post itself.

post office box

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:poBox
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.poBox
Label post office box
Definition A location designator for a postal delivery point at a post office, usually a number.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile post office box (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.poBox)
    Definition: A location designator for a postal delivery point at a post office, usually a number.
    • profiles property PO box (locn:poBox)
      Definition: The Post Office Box number. The domain of locn:poBox is locn:Address.

thoroughfare

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:thoroughfare
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.thoroughfare
Label thoroughfare
Definition The name of a passage or way through from one location to another.
Domain Address
Range xsd:string [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile thoroughfare (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Address.thoroughfare)
    Definition: The name of a passage or way through from one location to another.
    • profiles property thoroughfare (locn:thoroughfare)
      Definition: An address component that represents the name of a passage or way through from one location to another. A thoroughfare is not necessarily a road, it might be a waterway or some other feature. The domain of locn:thoroughfare is locn:Address.
Usage note A thoroughfare is usually a street, but it might be a waterway or some other feature. For example, "Avenue des Champs-Élysées".

name

Profiled relationship IRI(s) foaf:name
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Agent.name
Label name
Definition Name of the agent.
Domain Agent
Range xsd:string [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile name (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Agent.name)
    Definition: Name of the agent.
    • profiles property name (foaf:name)
      Definition: A name for some thing.
      • specializes property label (rdfs:label)
        Definition: A human-readable name for the subject.
Usage note It is used for the official name of the agent. For Persons it is combination of first and family names. Recommended format is "family names, first names".

Checksum

Profiled class IRI(s) spdx:Checksum
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Checksum
Label Checksum
Definition A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Checksum (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Checksum)
    • profiles class profile Checksum (dcat-ap:Checksum)
      Definition: A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.
      • profiles class profile Checksum (dcat-dap:Checksum)
        • profiles class without assigned name (spdx:Checksum)
          Definition: A Checksum is value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated. Even small changes to the content of the file will change its checksum. This class allows the results of a variety of checksum and cryptographic message digest algorithms to be represented.
Usage note This class allows the results of a variety of checksum and cryptographic message digest algorithms to be represented.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

checksum value

Profiled relationship IRI(s) spdx:checksumValue
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Checksum.checksumValue
Label checksum value
Definition A lower case hexadecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.
Domain Checksum
Range xsd:hexBinary [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile checksum value (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Checksum.checksumValue)
    Definition: A lower case hexadecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.
    • profiles property profile checksum value (dcat-ap:Checksum.checksumValue)
      Definition: A lower case hexadecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.
      • profiles property profile checksum value (dcat-dap:Checksum.checksumValue)
        • profiles property without assigned name (spdx:checksumValue)
          Definition: The checksumValue property provides a lower case hexidecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.
Usage note Value is generated automatically using given algorithm.

uses algorithm

Profiled relationship IRI(s) spdx:algorithm
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Checksum.usesAlgorithm
Label uses algorithm
Definition The algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum.
Domain Checksum
Range Checksum algorithm [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile uses algorithm (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Checksum.usesAlgorithm)
    • profiles property profile algorithm (dcat-ap:Checksum.algorithm)
      Definition: The algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum.
      • profiles property profile algorithm (dcat-dap:Checksum.algorithm)
        Definition: Identifies the algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum [SPDX].
        • profiles property without assigned name (spdx:algorithm)
          Definition: Identifies the algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum. Currently, SHA-1 is the only supported algorithm. It is anticipated that other algorithms will be supported at a later time.
Usage note Version 2.2 of [[SPDX]] defines individuals for the following algorithms: MD2, MD4, MD5, MD6, SHA-1, SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512.

    Definition: Data service label
    • profiles property label (rdfs:label)
      Definition: A human-readable name for the subject.

Dataset

Profiled class IRI(s) dcat:Dataset
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Dataset
Label Dataset
Definition A conceptual entity that represents the information published.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Dataset (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset)
    Definition: A conceptual entity that represents the information published.
    • profiles class profile Dataset (dcat-ap:Dataset)
      Definition: A conceptual entity that represents the information published.
      • profiles class profile Dataset (dcat-dap:Dataset)
        • profiles class Dataset (dcat:Dataset)
          Definition: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.
          • specializes class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
            Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
        • specializes class profile Cataloged Resource (dcat-dap:CatalogedResource)
          • profiles class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
            Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
      • specializes class profile Catalogued Resource (dcat-ap:CataloguedResource)
        • profiles class profile Cataloged Resource (dcat-dap:CatalogedResource)
          • profiles class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
            Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
    • specializes class profile Resource (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Resource)
      • profiles class Resource (rdfs:Resource)
        Definition: The class resource, everything.

    Definition: Relation to the description of a dataset.

Usage note Description may have various type from the codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/DescriptionType/.

has distribution

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:distribution
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasDistribution
Label has distribution
Definition An available Distribution for the Dataset.
Domain Dataset
Range Distribution [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has distribution (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasDistribution)
    • profiles property profile dataset distribution (dcat-ap:Dataset.datasetDistribution)

        • profiles property distribution (dcat:distribution)
          Definition: An available distribution of the dataset.
          • specializes property Relation (dcterms:relation)
            Definition: A related resource.
Usage note For the distribution of data in the form of files use instances of class Distribution – downloadable file. For the distribution of data through service use instance of class Distribution – data service.

has location

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:spatial
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasLocation
Label has location
Definition The geographical area covered by the dataset.
Domain Dataset
Range Location [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has location (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasLocation)
    • profiles property profile geographical coverage (dcat-ap:Dataset.geographicalCoverage)
      • profiles property profile spatial/geographical coverage (dcat-dap:Dataset.spatial-geographicalCoverage)
        Definition: The geographical area covered by the dataset.
        • profiles property Spatial Coverage (dcterms:spatial)
          Definition: Spatial characteristics of the resource.
          • specializes property Coverage (dcterms:coverage)
            Definition: The spatial or temporal topic of the resource, spatial applicability of the resource, or jurisdiction under which the resource is relevant.
Usage note In the CCMM spatial coverage does not only cover the area of dataset, it may be connected to the dataset in some other way, e.g. the place from where the data were measured, administrative area to which the dataset conforms or other.

has other language

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:language
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasOtherLanguage
Label has other language
Definition Any other languages of the Dataset.
Domain Dataset
Range Language system [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has other language (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasOtherLanguage)
    Definition: Any other languages of the Dataset.
    • profiles property profile language (dcat-ap:Dataset.language)
      Definition: A language of the Dataset.
      • profiles property profile language (dcat-dap:CatalogedResource.language)
        Definition: A language of the resource. This refers to the natural language used for textual metadata (i.e., titles, descriptions, etc.) of a cataloged resource (i.e., dataset or service) or the textual values of a dataset distribution
        • profiles property Language (dcterms:language)
          Definition: A language of the resource.
Usage note This property can be repeated if there are multiple languages in the Dataset.

has subject

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#hasSubject
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasSubject
Label has subject
Definition Dataset described using a subject.
Domain Dataset
Range Subject [1..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has subject (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Dataset.hasSubject)
    Definition: Dataset described using a subject.
    • profiles property has subject (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#hasSubject)
Usage note At least one subject must be a value from FRASCATI FORD vocabulary. For that subject use reference codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/SubjectCategory/ as the Subject scheme and select at least one value from this codelist as a subject.

Distribution

Profiled class IRI(s) dcat:Distribution
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Distribution
Label Distribution
Definition A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Distribution (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution)
    • profiles class profile Distribution (dcat-ap:Distribution)
      • profiles class profile Distribution (dcat-dap:Distribution)
        • profiles class Distribution (dcat:Distribution)
          Definition: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).
Usage note This represents a general availability of a dataset. It implies no information about the actual access method of the data, i.e., whether by direct download, API, or through a Web page. This is an abstract type. Use its subclasses to determine downloadable file or data service.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

    Definition: A name given to the distribution.
    • profiles property Title (dcterms:title)
      Definition: A name given to the resource.

      Definition: Physical embodiment of the dataset as a particular data service.

        Definition: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).
    • specializes class profile Distribution (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution)
      • profiles class profile Distribution (dcat-ap:Distribution)

A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

conforms to specification

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:conformsTo
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.conformsToSpecification
Label conforms to specification
Definition An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.
Domain Distribution - data service
Range Application profile [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile conforms to specification (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.conformsToSpecification)
    • profiles property profile linked schemas (dcat-ap:Distribution.linkedSchemas)
      Definition: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.
      • profiles property profile conforms to (dcat-dap:Distribution.conformsTo)
        Definition: An established standard to which the distribution conforms.
        • profiles property Conforms To (dcterms:conformsTo)
          Definition: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.
          • specializes property Relation (dcterms:relation)
            Definition: A related resource.
Usage note This property SHOULD be used to indicate the profile or specification that this data service conforms to. This is (generally) a complementary concern to the service standard.

description

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:description
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.Description

Definition A free-text account of the Distribution.

Range Text [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile description (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.Description)
    Definition: A free-text account of the Distribution.
    • profiles property profile description (dcat-ap:Distribution.description)
      • profiles property profile description (dcat-dap:Distribution.description)
        Definition: A free-text account of the distribution.
        • profiles property Description (dcterms:description)
          Definition: An account of the resource.
Usage note This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the description.

has access service

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:accessService
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.hasAccessService
Label has access service
Definition A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.
Domain Distribution - data service
Range Data Service [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has access service (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.hasAccessService)
    • profiles property profile access service (dcat-ap:Distribution.accessService)
      Definition: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.
      • profiles property profile access service (dcat-dap:Distribution.accessService)
        • profiles property data access service (dcat:accessService)
          Definition: A site or end-point that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.
Usage note Access service SHOULD be used to link to a description of Data service that can provide access to this distribution.

  • profiles property profile has documentation (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.hasDocumentation)
    • profiles property profile documentation (dcat-ap:Distribution.documentation)
      Definition: A page or document about this Distribution.
      • profiles property page (foaf:page)
        Definition: A page or document about this thing.

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#Distribution-DownloadableFile
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Distribution-DownloadableFile
Label Distribution - downloadable file
Definition Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Distribution - downloadable file (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile)
    Definition: Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.
    • profiles class Distribution - downloadable file (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#Distribution-DownloadableFile)
      Definition: Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.
      • specializes class Distribution (dcat:Distribution)
        Definition: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).
    • specializes class profile Distribution (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution)
      • profiles class profile Distribution (dcat-ap:Distribution)
        • profiles class profile Distribution (dcat-dap:Distribution)
          • profiles class Distribution (dcat:Distribution)
            Definition: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

access URL

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:accessURL
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.accessUrl
Label access URL
Definition A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range File [1..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile access URL (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.accessUrl)
    • profiles property profile access URL (dcat-ap:Distribution.accessUrl)
      Definition: A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset.
      • profiles property profile access URL (dcat-dap:Distribution.accessUrl)
        Definition: A URL of the resource that gives access to a distribution of the dataset. E.g., landing page, feed, SPARQL endpoint.
        • profiles property access address (dcat:accessURL)
          Definition: A URL of a resource that gives access to a distribution of the dataset. E.g. landing page, feed, SPARQL endpoint. Use for all cases except a simple download link, in which case downloadURL is preferred.
Usage note The resource at the access URL contains information about how to get the Dataset. It shall be the web page (not a document file).

byte size

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:byteSize
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.byteSize
Label byte size
Definition The size of a Distribution in bytes.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range xsd:integer [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile byte size (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.byteSize)
    Definition: The size of a Distribution in bytes.
    • profiles property profile byte size (dcat-ap:Distribution.byteSize)
      • profiles property profile byte size (dcat-dap:Distribution.byteSize)
        • profiles property byte size (dcat:byteSize)
          Definition: The size of a distribution in bytes.

conforms to schema

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:conformsTo
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.conformsToSchema
Label conforms to schema
Definition An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range Application profile [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile conforms to schema (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.conformsToSchema)
    • profiles property profile linked schemas (dcat-ap:Distribution.linkedSchemas)
      Definition: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.
      • profiles property profile conforms to (dcat-dap:Distribution.conformsTo)
        Definition: An established standard to which the distribution conforms.
        • profiles property Conforms To (dcterms:conformsTo)
          Definition: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.
          • specializes property Relation (dcterms:relation)
            Definition: A related resource.
Usage note This property SHOULD be used to indicate the model, schema, ontology, view or profile that this representation of a dataset conforms to. This is (generally) a complementary concern to the media-type or format.

download URL

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:downloadURL
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.downloadUrl
Label download URL
Definition A URL that is a direct link to a downloadable file in a given format.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range File [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile download URL (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.downloadUrl)
    • profiles property profile download URL (dcat-ap:Distribution.downloadUrl)
      Definition: A URL that is a direct link to a downloadable file in a given format.
      • profiles property profile download URL (dcat-dap:Distribution.downloadUrl)
        • profiles property download URL (dcat:downloadURL)
          Definition: The URL of the downloadable file in a given format. E.g. CSV file or RDF file. The format is indicated by the distribution's dcterms:format and/or dcat:mediaType.
Usage note Download URL SHOULD be used for the URL at which this distribution is available directly, typically through a HTTP Get request.

has checksum

Profiled relationship IRI(s) spdx:checksum
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.hasChecksum
Label has checksum
Definition A mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a distribution have not changed.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range Checksum [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has checksum (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DataService.hasChecksum)
    • profiles property profile checksum (dcat-ap:Distribution.checksum)
      Definition: A mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a distribution have not changed.
      • profiles property profile checksum (dcat-dap:Distribution.checksum)
        • profiles property without assigned name (spdx:checksum)
          Definition: The checksum property provides a mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a File or Package have not changed.
Usage note The checksum is related to the download URL.

has format

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:format
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.hasFormat
Label has format
Definition The file format of the distribution.
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range Format [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has format (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.hasFormat)
    • profiles property profile format (dcat-ap:Distribution.format)
      • profiles property profile format (dcat-dap:Distribution.format)
        Definition: The file format of the distribution.
        • profiles property Format (dcterms:format)
          Definition: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource.
Usage note

media type

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:mediaType
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.mediaType
Label media type
Definition The media type of the distribution as defined by IANA
Domain Distribution - downloadable file
Range Media Type [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile media type (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Distribution-DownloadableFile.mediaType)
    • profiles property profile media type (dcat-ap:Distribution.mediaType)
      • profiles property profile media type (dcat-dap:Distribution.mediaType)
        • profiles property media type (dcat:mediaType)
          Definition: The media type of the distribution as defined by IANA
          • specializes property Format (dcterms:format)
            Definition: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource.
Usage note This property SHOULD be used when the media type of the distribution is defined in IANA (using value from https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml), otherwise Format MAY be used with values from Publication Office of the EU File type codelist http://publications.europa.eu/resource/dataset/file-type.

Documentation

Profiled class IRI(s) foaf:Document
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Documentation
Label Documentation
Definition A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Documentation (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Documentation)
    Definition: A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.
    • profiles class profile Document (dcat-ap:Document)
      Definition: A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information, e.g. a web page about a Dataset.
      • profiles class Document (foaf:Document)
        Definition: A document.

File

Profiled class IRI(s) rdfs:Resource
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#File
Label File
Definition Digital resource representing collection of data.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile File (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/File)
    Definition: Digital resource representing collection of data.
    • profiles class profile Resource (dcat-ap:rdfs-Resource)
      Definition: Anything described by RDF.
      • profiles class profile Resource (dcat-dap:rdfs-Resource)
        • profiles class Resource (rdfs:Resource)
          Definition: The class resource, everything.
Usage note File is represented by URL on which is it accessable.

      • profiles class profile Media Type or Extent (dcat-dap:MediaTypeOrExtent)
        • profiles class Media Type or Extent (dcterms:MediaTypeOrExtent)
          Definition: A media type or extent.
Usage note Use IRI identifier from the register http://publications.europa.eu/resource/dataset/file-type. Human readable codelist representation is here: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/eu-vocabularies/concept-scheme/-/resource?uri=http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/file-type.

local identifier

    Definition: The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).

      Definition: The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).
Usage note In case the award or grant has an ID or DOI, the full URL shall be included.

Identifier

Profiled class IRI(s) adms:Identifier
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Identifier
Label Identifier
Definition Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Identifier (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Identifier)
    Definition: Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.
    • profiles class Identifier (adms:Identifier)
      Definition: This class is based on the UN/CEFACT Identifier complex type defined in See Section 5.8 of Core Components Data Type Catalogue Version 3.1 (http://www.unece.org/fileadmin/DAM/cefact/codesfortrade/CCTS/CCTS-DTCatalogueVersion3p1.pdf) In RDF this is expressed using the following properties: - the content string should be provided using skos:notation, datatyped with the identifier scheme (inclduing the version number if appropriate); - use dcterms:creator to link to a class describing the agency that manages the identifier scheme or adms:schemaAgency to provide the name as a literal. Although not part of the ADMS conceptual model, it may be useful to provide further properties to the Identifier class such as dcterms:created to provide the date on which the identifier was issued.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →
  • from domain →
  • from domain →

authorized

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#authorized
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Identifier.authorized
Label authorized
Definition Specifies whether the identifier is authorized by the subject it represents.
Domain Identifier
Range xsd:boolean [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile authorized (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Identifier.authorized)
    • profiles property Authorized (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#authorized)
      Definition: Specifies whether the identifier is authorized by the subject it represents.
Usage note This attribute shall be filled mainly for ORCiD identifiers of Persons. It serves to determine whether the person in the repository is really the person it is meant to be.

      Definition: Relation between the identifier and scheme in which it is defined and unique.

value

Profiled relationship IRI(s) skos:notation
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Identifier.value
Label value
Definition Value of the identifer within the given identifier scheme.
Domain Identifier
Range xsd:string [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile value (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Identifier.value)
    Definition: Value of the identifer within the given identifier scheme.
    • profiles property notation (skos:notation)
      Definition: A notation, also known as classification code, is a string of characters such as "T58.5" or "303.4833" used to uniquely identify a concept within the scope of a given concept scheme.

Identifier scheme

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#IdentifierScheme
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#IdentifierScheme
Label Identifier scheme
Definition Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Identifier scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/IdentifierScheme)
    • profiles class Identifier scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#IdentifierScheme)
      Definition: Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.
Usage note Use identifier scheme in the form of IRI identifier. Methodology shall list known sources.

Usage note A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.

Location

Profiled class IRI(s) dcterms:Location
https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#Geolocation
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Location
Label Location
Definition Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Location (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location)
    Definition: Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource.
    • profiles class profile Location (dcat-ap:Location)
      • profiles class profile Location (dcat-dap:Location)
        • profiles class Location (dcterms:Location)
          Definition: A spatial region or named place.
          • specializes class Location, Period, or Jurisdiction (dcterms:LocationPeriodOrJurisdiction)
            Definition: A location, period of time, or jurisdiction.
    • profiles class GeoLocation (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#Geolocation)
      Definition: Spatial region or named place where the data was gathered or about which the data is focused.
Usage note Location is represented according to the Open Formal Standard for Spatial Data. Locations are represented as a reference to the named place, geographic region or specific geometry according to the standardized geometry object representation. Every Location instance must have at least one of the following attributes/relations: bbox, location name, geometry and/or related object identifier.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

bounding box

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:bbox
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.bbox
Label bounding box
Definition Bounding box of the location geometry.
Domain Location
Range Literal [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile bounding box (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.bbox)
    Definition: Bounding box of the location geometry.
    • profiles property bounding box (dcat:bbox)
      Definition: The geographic bounding box of a spatial thing [SDW-BP].
Usage note Typically defined by top-left and bottom-right corners.

has geometry

Profiled relationship IRI(s) locn:geometry
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasGeometry
Label has geometry
Definition The corresponding geometry for a resource.
Domain Location
Range Geometry [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has geometry (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasGeometry)
    • profiles property profile geometry (dcat-ap:Location.geometry)
      Definition: The corresponding geometry for a resource.
      • profiles property profile geometry (dcat-dap:Location.geometry)
        Definition: Associates a spatial thing [SDW-BP] with a corresponding geometry.
        • profiles property geometry (locn:geometry)
          Definition: Associates any resource with the corresponding geometry.
Usage note The range of this property allows for any type of geometry specification. E.g., the geometry could be encoded by a literal, as WKT (geosparql:wktLiteral), or represented by a class, as geosparql:Geometry (or any of its subclasses).

has location relation type

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasType
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasLocationRelationType
Label has location relation type
Definition Relation of the location to the dataset.
Domain Location
Range Location relation type [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has location relation type (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasLocationRelationType)
    Definition: Relation of the location to the dataset.
    • profiles property has type (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasType)
      Definition: Reference to the codelist value giving the specific type to the attribute.
Usage note Use values from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/LocationRelation/.

has related object

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasRelatedResource
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasRelatedObject
Label has related object
Definition Relation to the spatial object.
Domain Location
Range Related resource [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has related object (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.hasRelatedObject)
    Definition: Relation to the spatial object.
    • profiles property has related resource (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasRelatedResource)
Usage note The relation is provided by the identifier of the related object. It shall be identifier of an existing spatial object in a registry, such as Place Named Authority List (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/place), Register of Territorial Identification, Addresses and Real Estates or others.

name

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:title
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.name
Label name
Definition Name of the spatial location.
Domain Location
Range Text [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile name (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Location.name)
    Definition: Name of the spatial location.
    • profiles property Title (dcterms:title)
      Definition: A name given to the resource.
Usage note Name of the place. Examples: Prague Castle, Tour d'Eiffel, Šumava National Park

  • profiles class profile Metadata Record (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord)
    Definition: Description of the metadata record of the dataset.
    • profiles class profile Catalogue Record (dcat-ap:CatalogueRecord)
      • profiles class profile Catalog Record (dcat-dap:CatalogRecord)
        Definition: A record in a catalog, describing the registration of a single dcat:Resource.
        • profiles class Catalog Record (dcat:CatalogRecord)
          Definition: A record in a data catalog, describing the registration of a single dataset or data service.
Usage note In case metadata is harvested from external catalogue, metadata record IRI shall be the same as IRI of the metadata record in original repository.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

without assigned name

Profiled relationship IRI(s)
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.qualifiedRelation
Definition Link to a description of a relationship between metadata record and agent with the specification of the role of agent in this relationship.
Domain Metadata Record
Range Resource to agent relationship [1..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile without assigned name (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.qualifiedRelation)
    Definition: Link to a description of a relationship between metadata record and agent with the specification of the role of agent in this relationship.
Usage note Relationship shall contain at least one agent with role "Data Manager" from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AgentRole/.

conforms to standard

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:conformsTo
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.conformsToStandard
Label conforms to standard
Definition An established standard to which the metadata record conforms.
Domain Metadata Record
Range Application profile [1..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile conforms to standard (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.conformsToStandard)
    Definition: An established standard to which the metadata record conforms.
    • profiles property profile conforms to (dcat-dap:CatalogRecord.conformsTo)
      • profiles property Conforms To (dcterms:conformsTo)
        Definition: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.
        • specializes property Relation (dcterms:relation)
          Definition: A related resource.
Usage note This property SHOULD be used to indicate the standard or profile that was used to describe cataloged resource content.

date created

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:created

Definition The date on which the metadata record was created.

Range xsd:date [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile date created (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.dateCreated)
    Definition: The date on which the metadata record was created.
    • profiles property Date Created (dcterms:created)
      Definition: Date of creation of the resource.
      • specializes property Date (dcterms:date)
        Definition: A point or period of time associated with an event in the lifecycle of the resource.

date updated

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:modified
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.dateUpdated
Label date updated
Definition Date on which the resource was changed.
Domain Metadata Record
Range xsd:date [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile date updated (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.dateUpdated)
    • profiles property Date Modified (dcterms:modified)
      Definition: Date on which the resource was changed.
      • specializes property Date (dcterms:date)
        Definition: A point or period of time associated with an event in the lifecycle of the resource.
Usage note The date on which the metadata record was changed or modified.

describes

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#describes

Label describes
Definition Dataset described by the metadata record.

    Definition: Dataset described by the metadata record.

      Definition: Dataset described by the metadata record.

has original repository

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#originalRepository
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.hasOriginalRepository
Label has original repository
Definition Link to the repository in which the metadata were originally stored and curated.
Domain Metadata Record
Range Repository [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has original repository (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.hasOriginalRepository)
    Definition: Link to the repository in which the metadata were originally stored and curated.
    • profiles property original repository (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#originalRepository)
      Definition: Link to the repository from which the metadata were originally stored and curated.
Usage note Original repository is a repository where the original metadata was harvested from or where it was created and/or published. There is always exactly one original repository. If metadata record is harvested form other repository, make sure to include the first repository from which it was harvested.

language

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:language
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.hasLanguage
Label language
Definition A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions of the metadata record.
Domain Metadata Record
Range Language system [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile language (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/MetadataRecord.hasLanguage)
    Definition: A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions of the metadata record.
    • profiles property profile language (dcat-ap:CatalogueRecord.language)
      Definition: A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions, etc. of the Catalogued Resource.
      • profiles property Language (dcterms:language)
        Definition: A language of the resource.
Usage note This property can be repeated if the metadata is provided in multiple languages.

Organization

Profiled class IRI(s) foaf:Agent
prov:Organization
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Organization
Label Organization
Definition Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Organization (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Organization)
    Definition: Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures.
    • profiles class profile Agent (dcat-ap:Agent)
      Definition: Any entity carrying out actions with respect to the entities Catalogue and the Catalogued Resources.
      • profiles class profile Agent (dcat-dap:Agent)
        • profiles class Agent (foaf:Agent)
          Definition: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).
    • profiles class Organization (prov:Organization)
      • specializes class Agent (prov:Agent)
    • specializes class profile Agent (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Agent)
      • profiles class profile Agent (dcat-ap:Agent)
        Definition: Any entity carrying out actions with respect to the entities Catalogue and the Catalogued Resources.
        • profiles class profile Agent (dcat-dap:Agent)
          • profiles class Agent (foaf:Agent)
            Definition: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).

    Definition: Information about entities, activities, and people involved in producing a piece of data or thing.
    • profiles class profile Provenance Statement (dcat-ap:ProvenanceStatement)
      • profiles class Provenance Statement (dcterms:ProvenanceStatement)
        Definition: Any changes in ownership and custody of a resource since its creation that are significant for its authenticity, integrity, and interpretation.

  • from domain →

label

Profiled relationship IRI(s) rdfs:label
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/ProvenanceStatement.label
Label label
Definition Provenance state label.
Domain Provenance Statement
Range rdf:langString [0..*]

  • profiles property profile label (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/ProvenanceStatement.label)
    Definition: Provenance state label.

Related resource

Profiled class IRI(s) rdfs:Resource
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#RelatedResource
Label Related resource
Definition Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Related resource (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/RelatedResource)
    Definition: Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset.
    • profiles class Resource (rdfs:Resource)
      Definition: The class resource, everything.
    • specializes class profile Resource (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Resource)
      • profiles class Resource (rdfs:Resource)
        Definition: The class resource, everything.
Usage note Class is used for description of the resource together with the type of relation, for which is used value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/. Distributions of the datasets SHALL NOT be modeled as related resource, but as a distribution. Use qualified resource property to link to the dataset class. Examples of resources: other related dataset, used methodology, instrument used for measurement, conference or conference paper etc...

  • from domain →
  • from domain →
  • from domain →

Domain Related resource
Range Resource relation type [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has resource relation type (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Resource.hasResourceRelationType)
    Definition: Relation to the relation type between dataset and resource.
    • profiles property has type (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasType)
      Definition: Reference to the codelist value giving the specific type to the attribute.
Usage note Use value from https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/.

Definition Human readable resolvable URL representing the resource.

    Definition: Human readable resolvable URL representing the resource.

      Definition: Resolvable URL representing the resource, preferably human readable.
Usage note Resource URL represents human readable resolvable representation of the resource. Same url must be aslo in c:iri.

Repository

Profiled class IRI(s) dcat:Catalog
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Repository
Label Repository
Definition A catalogue or repository that hosts the Datasets or Data Services being described.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Repository (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Repository)
    • profiles class profile Catalogue (dcat-ap:Catalogue)
      Definition: A catalogue or repository that hosts the Datasets or Data Services being described.
      • profiles class profile Catalog (dcat-dap:Catalog)
        Definition: A curated collection of metadata about resources.
        • profiles class Catalog (dcat:Catalog)
          Definition: A curated collection of metadata about resources (e.g., datasets and data services in the context of a data catalog).
          • specializes class Dataset (dcat:Dataset)
            Definition: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.
            • specializes class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
              Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
        • specializes class profile Dataset (dcat-dap:Dataset)
          • profiles class Dataset (dcat:Dataset)
            Definition: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.
            • specializes class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
              Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
          • specializes class profile Cataloged Resource (dcat-dap:CatalogedResource)
            • profiles class Catalogued resource (dcat:Resource)
              Definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.

Resource

Profiled class IRI(s) rdfs:Resource
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#Resource
Label Resource
Definition The class resource, everything.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Resource (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Resource)
    • profiles class Resource (rdfs:Resource)
      Definition: The class resource, everything.
Usage note In the core model, resource is anything that is described within the metadata record, including dataset itself and all related resources. This class is also reused in domain extension for representing any physical or digital resources specific for the described scientific domain.

Resource to agent relationship

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#ResourceToAgentRelationship
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#ResourceToAgentRelationship
Label Resource to agent relationship
Definition An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Resource to agent relationship (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/ResourceToAgentRelationship)
    Definition: An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.
    • profiles class Resource to agent relationship (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#ResourceToAgentRelationship)
      Definition: An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.
      • specializes class Relationship (dcat:Relationship)
        Definition: An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between DCAT Resources.
Usage note Use to characterize a relationship between resources and agents, where the nature of the relationship is known but is not adequately characterized by the standard DCTERMS properties (dcterms:hasPart, dcterms:isPartOf, dcterms:conformsTo, dcterms:isFormatOf, dcterms:hasFormat, dcterms:isVersionOf, dcterms:hasVersion, dcterms:replaces, dcterms:isReplacedBy, dcterms:references, dcterms:isReferencedBy, dcterms:requires, dcterms:isRequiredBy) or PROV-O properties (prov:wasDerivedFrom, prov:wasInfluencedBy, prov:wasQuotedFrom, prov:wasRevisionOf, prov:hadPrimarySource, prov:alternateOf, prov:specializationOf). Roles of the agent in the relation are specified using had role relation.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →
  • from domain →

had role

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:hadRole
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/ResourceToAgentRelationship.hadRole
Label had role
Definition The function of an entity or agent with respect to another entity or resource.
Domain Resource to agent relationship
Range Resource agent role type [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile had role (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/ResourceToAgentRelationship.hadRole)
    • profiles property profile had role (dcat-ap:Relationship.hadRole)
      • profiles property profile had role (dcat-dap:Relationship.hadRole)
        • profiles property hadRole (dcat:hadRole)
          Definition: The function of an entity or agent with respect to another entity or resource.
Usage note May be used in a qualified-attribution to specify the role of an Agent with respect to an Entity. It is recommended that the value be taken from a controlled vocabulary of agent roles.

  • profiles property profile definition (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Subject.definition)
    Definition: Definition of the subject in the given context.
    • profiles property definition (skos:definition)
      Definition: A statement or formal explanation of the meaning of a concept.
      • specializes property note (skos:note)
        Definition: A general note, for any purpose.
Usage note Context is usually given by the subject scheme representing specific thesauri, vocabulary or simply a context (domain specific group at an university etc.).

in subject scheme

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#inSubjectScheme
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Subject.inSubjectScheme
Label in subject scheme
Definition Belonging of the subject to the subject scheme.
Domain Subject
Range Subject scheme [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile in subject scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Subject.inSubjectScheme)
    Definition: Belonging of the subject to the subject scheme.
    • profiles property in subject scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#inSubjectScheme)

title

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:title
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Subject.title
Label title
Definition Title of the subject.
Domain Subject
Range rdf:langString [1..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile title (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/Subject.title)
    Definition: Title of the subject.
    • profiles property Title (dcterms:title)
      Definition: A name given to the resource.

Subject scheme

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#SubjectScheme
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#SubjectScheme
Label Subject scheme
Definition Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Subject scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/SubjectScheme)
    Definition: Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.
    • profiles class Subject scheme (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#SubjectScheme)
      Definition: Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.
Usage note Subject scheme sets a contexts for all subjects within this scheme. It usually represents thesauri, vocabulary etc., but may also represent a set of concepts with the meaning of the same context, such as domain specific nomenclature.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

label

Profiled relationship IRI(s) rdfs:label
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/SubjectScheme.label
Label label
Definition Label of the subject scheme.
Domain Subject scheme
Range rdf:langString [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile label (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/SubjectScheme.label)
    Definition: Label of the subject scheme.
    • profiles property label (rdfs:label)
      Definition: A human-readable name for the subject.

Terms of use

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#Rights
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#TermsOfUse
Label Terms of use
Definition Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Terms of use (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse)
    Definition: Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset.
    • profiles class Rights (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#Rights)
      Definition: Any rights information for this resource. The property may be repeated to record complex rights characteristics.
Usage note

Backwards associations

  • from domain →

access rights

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:accessRights
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.accessRights
Label access rights
Definition Information about the conditions to access the resource or an indication of its security status.
Domain Terms of use
Range Access rights [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile access rights (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.accessRights)
    Definition: Information about the conditions to access the resource or an indication of its security status.
    • profiles property Access Rights (dcterms:accessRights)
      Definition: Information about who access the resource or an indication of its security status.
      • specializes property Rights (dcterms:rights)
        Definition: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

description

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:description
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.Description
Label description
Definition Descriptive text on details of rights and licensing.
Domain Terms of use
Range Text [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile description (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.Description)
    Definition: Descriptive text on details of rights and licensing.
    • profiles property Description (dcterms:description)
      Definition: An account of the resource.

has contact point

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcat:contactPoint
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.hasContactPoint
Label has contact point
Definition Contact point for the further details about the terms of use.
Domain Terms of use
Range Agent [0..*]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has contact point (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.hasContactPoint)
    Definition: Contact point for the further details about the terms of use.
    • profiles property contact point (dcat:contactPoint)
      Definition: Relevant contact information for the catalogued resource. Use of vCard is recommended.

has license

Profiled relationship IRI(s) dcterms:license
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.license
Label has license
Definition Reference to the legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
Domain Terms of use
Range License Document [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has license (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TermsOfUse.license)
    Definition: Reference to the legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
    • profiles property License (dcterms:license)
      Definition: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
      • specializes property Rights (dcterms:rights)
        Definition: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

Time instant

Profiled class IRI(s) time:Instant
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#TimeInstant
Label Time instant
Definition A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Time instant (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInstant)
    Definition: A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.
    • profiles class Time instant (time:Instant)
      Definition: A temporal entity with zero extent or duration
      • specializes class Temporal entity (time:TemporalEntity)
        Definition: A temporal interval or instant.
    • specializes class profile Time representation (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeRepresentation)
      Definition: Representation of time reference as a temporal interval or instant on which something relevant to the resource has happened.
      • profiles class Temporal entity (time:TemporalEntity)
        Definition: A temporal interval or instant.
Usage note Use for representation of time reference with zero extent or duration.

Backwards associations

  • from domain →
  • from domain →

date

Profiled relationship IRI(s) time:inXSDDate
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInstant.date
Label date
Definition Position of an instant, expressed using xsd:date.
Domain Time instant
Range xsd:date [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile date (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInstant.date)
    Definition: Position of an instant, expressed using xsd:date.
    • profiles property in XSD date (time:inXSDDate)
      Definition: Position of an instant, expressed using xsd:date
Usage note Each time instant SHALL have exactly one date OR date time stamp attribute.

date time

Profiled relationship IRI(s) time:inXSDDateTime
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInstant.dateTime
Label date time
Definition Date with timestamp represented as xsd:dateTime.
Domain Time instant
Range xsd:dateTime [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile date time (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInstant.dateTime)
    Definition: Date with timestamp represented as xsd:dateTime.
    • profiles property in XSD Date-Time (time:inXSDDateTime)
      Definition: Position of an instant, expressed using xsd:dateTime
Usage note Each time instant SHALL have exactly one date OR date time attribute. Maintanance note: In the draft on newest version of Time ontology, in XSD date-time is deprecated and replaced with in XSD date-time-stamp.

Time interval

Profiled class IRI(s) time:Interval
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#TimeInterval
Label Time interval
Definition A temporal entity with an extent or duration
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Time interval (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInterval)
    • profiles class Time interval (time:Interval)
      Definition: A temporal entity with an extent or duration
      • specializes class Temporal entity (time:TemporalEntity)
        Definition: A temporal interval or instant.
    • specializes class profile Time representation (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeRepresentation)
      Definition: Representation of time reference as a temporal interval or instant on which something relevant to the resource has happened.
      • profiles class Temporal entity (time:TemporalEntity)
        Definition: A temporal interval or instant.
Usage note Use for representation of time reference represented as an interval. Interval is represented by beginning and end time instants.

has beginning

Profiled relationship IRI(s) time:hasBeginning
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInterval.hasBeginning
Label has beginning
Definition Time instant representing the beginning of a temporal interval.
Domain Time interval
Range Time instant [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has beginning (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInterval.hasBeginning)
    Definition: Time instant representing the beginning of a temporal interval.
    • profiles property has beginning (time:hasBeginning)
      Definition: Beginning of a temporal entity
      • specializes property has time (time:hasTime)
        Definition: Supports the association of a temporal entity (instant or interval) to any thing

has end

Profiled relationship IRI(s) time:hasEnd
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInterval.hasEnd
Label has end
Definition Time instant representing the end of a temporal interval.
Domain Time interval
Range Time instant [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has end (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeInterval.hasEnd)
    Definition: Time instant representing the end of a temporal interval.
    • profiles property has end (time:hasEnd)
      Definition: End of a temporal entity.
      • specializes property has time (time:hasTime)
        Definition: Supports the association of a temporal entity (instant or interval) to any thing

Time reference

Profiled class IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#TimeReference
IRI https://example.com/profile/JAKL_CCMM_AP#TimeReference
Label Time reference
Definition An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.
Hierarchy
  • profiles class profile Time reference (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeReference)
    Definition: An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.
    • profiles class Time reference (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#TimeReference)
      Definition: An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.

  • from domain →
  • from domain →

date information

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#dateInformation
IRI https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeReference.dateInformation
Label date information
Definition Additional information to the date in text form.
Domain Time reference
Range Text [0..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile date information (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeReference.dateInformation)
    Definition: Additional information to the date in text form.
    • profiles property date information (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/datacite#dateInformation)
      Definition: Specific information about the date, if appropriate.
Usage note Write any additional information needed to understand the meaning of event that happened in the given time.

has date type

Profiled relationship IRI(s) https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasType

Label has date type
Definition Reference to the codelist of date types.
Domain Time reference
Range Date type [1..1]
Hierarchy
  • profiles property profile has date type (https://model.ccmm.cz/research-data/TimeReference.hasDateType)
    Definition: Reference to the codelist of date types.
    • profiles property has type (https://model.ccmm.cz/vocabulary/ccmm#hasType)
      Definition: Reference to the codelist value giving the specific type to the attribute.
Usage note
