Data structure specification for Geometry

Data structure for Geometry. The Geometry class provides the means to identify a location as a point, line, polygon, etc. expressed using coordinates in some coordinate reference system.

JSON structure for Geometry

IRI
/geometry/schema.json
Defined in
../geometry/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Geometry

Description The Geometry class provides the means to identify a location as a point, line, polygon, etc. expressed using coordinates in some coordinate reference system.
Interpretation Geometry
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Geometry"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Geometry"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • gml: (geography markup language literal) optional item of type string
  • wkt: (well known text literal) optional item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Geometry, which is defined in the file ../geometry/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element geometry
  • complex type geometry

Root element <geometry>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:geometry.

Root complex type geometry

Meaning
Geometry (The Geometry class provides the means to identify a location as a point, line, polygon, etc. expressed using coordinates in some coordinate reference system.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]
  • element <gml> [0..1]
  • element <wkt> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of geometry object.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <gml>

Meaning
property geography markup language literal (Representation of geometry object as GML Literal.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anySimpleType.

Element <wkt>

Meaning
property well known text literal (Representation of geometry object as WKT Literal.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anySimpleType.

Data structure specification for Language system

Data structure for Language system. A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.

JSON structure for Language system

IRI
/language-system/schema.json
Defined in
../language-system/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Language system

Description A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.
Interpretation Language system
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Language system"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Language system"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Language system, which is defined in the file ../language-system/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element language_system
  • complex type language_system

Root element <language_system>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:language_system.

Root complex type language_system

Meaning
Language system (A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Language label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Identifier scheme

Data structure for Identifier scheme. Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.

JSON structure for Identifier scheme

IRI
/identifier-scheme/schema.json
Defined in
../identifier-scheme/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Identifier scheme

Description Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.
Interpretation Identifier scheme
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Identifier scheme"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Identifier scheme"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Identifier scheme, which is defined in the file ../identifier-scheme/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element identifier_scheme
  • complex type identifier_scheme

Root element <identifier_scheme>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier_scheme.

Root complex type identifier_scheme

Meaning
Identifier scheme (Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Identifier scheme label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for File

Data structure for File. Downloadable file in given format.

JSON structure for File

IRI
/file/schema.json
Defined in
../file/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object File

Description Digital resource representing collection of data.
Interpretation File
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "File"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "File"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for File, which is defined in the file ../file/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation

  • element file
  • complex type file

Root element <file>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:file.

Root complex type file

Meaning
File (Digital resource representing collection of data.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (File label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Repository

Data structure for Repository. A curated collection of metadata about resources.

JSON structure for Repository

IRI
/repository/schema.json
Defined in
../repository/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Repository

Description A catalogue or repository that hosts the Datasets or Data Services being described.
Interpretation Repository
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Katalog"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Katalog"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Repository, which is defined in the file ../repository/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element repository
  • complex type repository

Root element <repository>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:repository.

Root complex type repository

Meaning
Repository (A catalogue or repository that hosts the Datasets or Data Services being described.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Human readable name of the repository.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Terms of use

Data structure for Terms of use. Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset.

JSON structure for Terms of use

IRI
/terms-of-use/schema.json
Defined in
../terms-of-use/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Terms of use

Description Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset.
Interpretation Terms of use
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Terms of use"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Terms of use"
  • access_rights: (access rights) required item of type according to
  • license: (has license) required item of type according to
  • description: (description) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • cs: optional item of type string
    • en: optional item of type string
  • contact_point: (has contact point) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type at least one of the following (anyOf):
    • according to
    • according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Terms of use, which is defined in the file ../terms-of-use/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../access-rights/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../license-document/schema.xsd
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../agent/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element terms_of_use
  • complex type terms_of_use

Root element <terms_of_use>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:terms_of_use.

Root complex type terms_of_use

Meaning
Terms of use (Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <access_rights> [1..1]
  • element <license> [1..1]
  • element <description> [0..*]
  • element <contact_point> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <access_rights>

Meaning
property access rights (Information about the conditions to access the resource or an indication of its security status.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:access_rights.
Meaning
Access rights (A statement about the access rights to the dataset.)

Element <license>

Meaning
property has license (Reference to the legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:license_document.
Meaning
License Document (A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.)

Element <description>

Meaning
property description (Descriptive text on details of rights and licensing.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <contact_point>

Meaning
property has contact point (Contact point for the further details about the terms of use.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:agent.

Data structure specification for Data service

Data structure for Data service. A collection of operations that provides access to one or more datasets or data processing functions.

JSON structure for Data service

IRI
/data-service/schema.json
Defined in
../data-service/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Data Service

Description A collection of operations that provides access to one or more datasets or data processing functions.
Interpretation Data Service
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Data Service"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Data Service"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • endpoint_url: (endpoint URL) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Data service, which is defined in the file ../data-service/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../related-resource/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element data_service
  • complex type data_service

Root element <data_service>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:data_service.

Root complex type data_service

Meaning
Data Service (A collection of operations that provides access to one or more datasets or data processing functions.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]
  • element <endpoint_url> [1..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Data service label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <endpoint_url>

Meaning
property endpoint URL (The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI).)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:related_resource.
Meaning
Related resource (Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset. )

Data structure specification for Access rights

Data structure for Access rights. Access rights to the resource.

JSON structure for Access rights

IRI
/access-rights/schema.json
Defined in
../access-rights/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Access rights

Description A statement about the access rights to the dataset.
Interpretation Access rights
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Access rights"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Access rights"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Access rights, which is defined in the file ../access-rights/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element access_rights
  • complex type access_rights

Root element <access_rights>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:access_rights.

Root complex type access_rights

Meaning
Access rights (A statement about the access rights to the dataset.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of the access rights vocabulary value.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Contact details

Data structure for Contact details. Contact details such as telephone, e-mail address etc.

JSON structure for Contact details

IRI
/contact-details/schema.json
Defined in
../contact-details/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Contact details

Description Details to contact the agent in a relationship to the resource.
Interpretation Contact details
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Contact details"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Contact details"
  • data_box: (data box) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • email: (email) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • phone: (phone) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • address: (has address) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Contact details, which is defined in the file ../contact-details/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../address/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element contact_details
  • complex type contact_details

Root element <contact_details>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:contact_details.

Root complex type contact_details

Meaning
Contact details (Details to contact the agent in a relationship to the resource.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <data_box> [0..*]
  • element <email> [0..*]
  • element <phone> [0..*]
  • element <address> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <data_box>

Meaning
property data box (Code of the data box.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <email>

Meaning
property email (Email address.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <phone>

Meaning
property phone (Phone number)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <address>

Meaning
property has address (To specify the components of the delivery address for the object)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:address.
Meaning
Address (A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location. )

Data structure specification for Subject scheme

Data structure for Subject scheme. Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.

JSON structure for Subject scheme

IRI
/subject-scheme/schema.json
Defined in
../subject-scheme/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Subject scheme

Description Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.
Interpretation Subject scheme
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Subject scheme"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Subject scheme"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Subject scheme, which is defined in the file ../subject-scheme/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

  • element subject_scheme
  • complex type subject_scheme

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:subject_scheme.

Root complex type subject_scheme

Meaning
Subject scheme (Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of the subject scheme.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Identifier

Data structure for Identifier. This is based on the UN/CEFACT Identifier class.

JSON structure for Identifier

IRI
/identifier/schema.json
Defined in
../identifier/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Identifier

Description Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.
Interpretation Identifier
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Identifier"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Identifier"
  • value: (value) required item of type string
  • scheme: (in scheme) required item of type according to
  • authorized: (authorized) optional item of type boolean (yes/no)

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Identifier, which is defined in the file ../identifier/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../identifier-scheme/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element identifier
  • complex type identifier

Root element <identifier>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier.

Root complex type identifier

Meaning
Identifier (Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <value> [1..1]
  • element <scheme> [1..1]
  • element <authorized> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <value>

Meaning
property value (Value of the identifer within the given identifier scheme.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <scheme>

Meaning
property in scheme (Relation between the identifier and scheme in which it is defined and unique.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier_scheme.
Meaning
Identifier scheme (Scheme in which is the identifier value unique, usually representing some authority. Identifier scheme shall always be represented as IRI identifier.)

Element <authorized>

Meaning
property authorized (Specifies whether the identifier is authorized by the subject it represents.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:boolean.

Data structure specification for Organization

Data structure for Organization. Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures.

JSON structure for Organization

IRI
/organization/schema.json
Defined in
../organization/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Organization

Description Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures.
Interpretation Organization
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Agent", "Organization"
  • identifier: (has identifier) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • name: (name) required item of type string
  • alternate_name: (alternate name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • cs: optional item of type string
    • en: optional item of type string
  • contact_point: (has contact point) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Organization, which is defined in the file ../organization/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../identifier/schema.xsd
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../contact-details/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element organization
  • complex type organization

Root element <organization>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:organization.

Root complex type organization

Meaning
Organization (Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <identifier> [0..*]
  • element <name> [1..1]
  • element <alternate_name> [0..*]
  • element <contact_point> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <identifier>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier.
Meaning
Identifier (Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.)

Element <name>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <alternate_name>

Meaning
property alternate name (To specify the organizational name associated with the object)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <contact_point>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:contact_details.
Meaning
Contact details (Details to contact the agent in a relationship to the resource.)

Data structure specification for Documentation

Data structure for Documentation. A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.

JSON structure for Documentation

IRI
/documentation/schema.json
Defined in
../documentation/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Documentation

Description A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.
Interpretation Documentation
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Documentation"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Documentation"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Documentation, which is defined in the file ../documentation/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

  • element documentation
  • complex type documentation

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:documentation.

Root complex type documentation

Meaning
Documentation (A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.)

  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Documentation label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Resource to Agent Relationship

Data structure for Resource to Agent Relationship. An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Dataset and Agent.

JSON structure for Resource to Agent Relationship

IRI
/resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.json
Defined in
../resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Resource to agent relationship

Description An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.
Interpretation Resource to agent relationship
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Resource to agent relationship"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Resource to agent relationship"
  • relation: (has related agent) required item of type at least one of the following (anyOf):
    • according to
    • according to
  • role: (had role) required item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Resource to Agent Relationship, which is defined in the file ../resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../agent/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-agent-role-type/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element resource_to_agent_relationship
  • complex type resource_to_agent_relationship

Root element <resource_to_agent_relationship>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_to_agent_relationship.

Root complex type resource_to_agent_relationship

Meaning
Resource to agent relationship (An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <relation> [1..1]
  • element <role> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <relation>

Meaning
property has related agent (Specifies the agent an a given role in the relationship with the resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:agent.

Element <role>

Meaning
property had role (The function of an entity or agent with respect to another entity or resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_agent_role_type.
Meaning
Resource agent role type (Role of the agent in the relationship to the resource. )

Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Application profile

Description A standard or other specification to which a metadata record conforms.
Interpretation Application profile
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Application profile"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Application profile"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)
