Data structure specification for Address

Data structure for Address. An "address representation" as conceptually defined by the INSPIRE Address Representation data type. The locn:addressId property may be used to link this locn:Address to other representations.

JSON structure for Address

IRI
/address/schema.json
Defined in
../address/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Address

Description A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location.
Interpretation Address
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Address"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Address"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • full_address: (full address) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • po_box: (post office box) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • thoroughfare: (thoroughfare) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • locator_designator: (locator designator) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • locator_name: (locator name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • address_area: (address area) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • post_name: (post name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • administrative_unit_level_1: (administrative unit level 1) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • administrative_unit_level_2: (administrative unit level 2) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • post_code: (post code) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Address, which is defined in the file ../address/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element address
  • complex type address

Root element <address>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:address.

Root complex type address

Meaning
Address (A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]
  • element <full_address> [0..*]
  • element <po_box> [0..*]
  • element <thoroughfare> [0..*]
  • element <locator_designator> [0..*]
  • element <locator_name> [0..*]
  • element <address_area> [0..*]
  • element <post_name> [0..*]
  • element <administrative_unit_level_1> [0..*]
  • element <administrative_unit_level_2> [0..*]
  • element <post_code> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Address label)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <full_address>

Meaning
property full address (The complete address written as a string.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <po_box>

Meaning
property post office box (A location designator for a postal delivery point at a post office, usually a number.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <thoroughfare>

Meaning
property thoroughfare (The name of a passage or way through from one location to another.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <locator_designator>

Meaning
property locator designator (A number or sequence of characters that uniquely identifies the locator within the relevant scope.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <locator_name>

Meaning
property locator name (Proper noun(s) applied to the real world entity identified by the locator. The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <address_area>

Meaning
property address area (The name of a geographic area that groups Addresses.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <post_name>

Meaning
property post name (A name created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points. )
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <administrative_unit_level_1>

Meaning
property administrative unit level 1 (The name of the uppermost level of the address, almost always a country.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <administrative_unit_level_2>

Meaning
property administrative unit level 2 (The name of a secondary level/region of the address, usually a county, state or other such area that typically encompasses several localities.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <post_code>

Meaning
property post code (The code created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Data structure specification for Distribution

Data structure for Distribution. A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

JSON structure for Distribution

IRI
/distribution/schema.json
Defined in
../distribution/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is at least one of the following (anyOf):
  • according to
  • according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Distribution, which is defined in the file ../distribution/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../distribution-data-service/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../distribution-downloadable-file/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element distribution
  • complex type distribution

Root element <distribution>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution.

Root complex type distribution

Content - choice of one element from the set
  • element <distribution_data_service> [1..1]
  • element <distribution_downloadable_file> [1..1]

Element <distribution_data_service>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution_data_service.
Meaning
Distribution - data service (Physical embodiment of the dataset distribution as a particular data service. )

Element <distribution_downloadable_file>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution_downloadable_file.
Meaning
Distribution - downloadable file (Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format. )

Data structure specification for Time reference

Data structure for Time reference. An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.

JSON structure for Time reference

IRI
/time-reference/schema.json
Defined in
../time-reference/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Time reference

Description An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.
Interpretation Time reference
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Time reference"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Time reference"
  • temporal_representation: (has temporal representation) required item of type at least one of the following (anyOf):
    • according to
    • according to
  • date_type: (has date type) required item of type according to
  • date_information: (date information) optional item of type object with properties (properties):
    • cs: optional item of type string
    • en: optional item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Time reference, which is defined in the file ../time-reference/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-representation/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../date-type/schema.xsd
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element time_reference
  • complex type time_reference

Root element <time_reference>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_reference.

Root complex type time_reference

Meaning
Time reference (An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <temporal_representation> [1..1]
  • element <date_type> [1..1]
  • element <date_information> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <temporal_representation>

Meaning
property has temporal representation
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_representation.

Element <date_type>

Meaning
property has date type (Reference to the codelist of date types.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:date_type.
Meaning
Date type (Type of a date in relation to the resource.)

Element <date_information>

Meaning
property date information (Additional information to the date in text form.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Media Type

Data structure for Media Type. A file format or physical medium.

JSON structure for Media Type

IRI
/media-type/schema.json
Defined in
../media-type/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Media Type

Description A file format.
Interpretation Media Type
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Media Type"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Media Type"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Media Type, which is defined in the file ../media-type/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element media_type
  • complex type media_type

Root element <media_type>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:media_type.

Root complex type media_type

Meaning
Media Type (A file format.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Media type label.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Dataset

Data structure for Dataset. A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.

JSON structure for Dataset

IRI
/dataset/schema.json
Defined in
../dataset/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Dataset

Description A conceptual entity that represents the information published.
Interpretation Dataset
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Datová sada"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Datová sada"
  • metadata_identification: (is described by) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • identifier: (has identifier) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • version: (version) optional item of type string
  • title: (title) required item of type string
  • alternate_title: (has alternate title) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • qualified_relation: (qualified relation) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • publication_year: (publication year) required item of type string
  • time_reference: (has time reference) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • resource_type: (has resource type) optional item of type according to
  • primary_language: (has other language) optional item of type according to
  • other_language: (has other language) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • terms_of_use: (has terms of use) required item of type according to
  • subject: (has subject) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • description: (has description) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • location: (has location) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • funding_reference: (has funding reference) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • related_resource: (has related resource) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • distribution: (has distribution) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type at least one of the following (anyOf):
    • according to
    • according to
  • validation_result: (has validation result) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • provenance: (has provenance) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • additional_publication_year: (publication year) required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Dataset, which is defined in the file ../dataset/schema.xsd.

This is a documentation view of a profiled schema. Due to technical limitations of XML schemas, each namespace is defined in a separate file:

Prefix Namespace Schema File
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../dataset/schema.xsd
ccmm-ap https://schema.novyprofil.cz/2.0 ../dataset/schema.ccmm-extension.xsd

In this view, all elements are shown together with prefixes corresponding to their original namespace.

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../metadata-record/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../identifier/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../alternate-title/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-reference/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-type/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../language-system/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../terms-of-use/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../subject/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../description/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../location/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../funding-reference/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../related-resource/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../distribution/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../validation-result/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../provenance-statement/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element ccmm:dataset
  • complex type dataset

Root element <ccmm:dataset>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:dataset.

Root complex type dataset

Meaning
Dataset (A conceptual entity that represents the information published. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <ccmm:metadata_identification> [1..*]
  • element <ccmm:identifier> [1..*]
  • element <ccmm:version> [0..1]
  • element <ccmm:title> [1..1]
  • element <ccmm:alternate_title> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:qualified_relation> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:publication_year> [1..1]
  • element <ccmm:time_reference> [1..*]
  • element <ccmm:resource_type> [0..1]
  • element <ccmm:primary_language> [0..1]
  • element <ccmm:other_language> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:terms_of_use> [1..1]
  • element <ccmm:subject> [1..*]
  • element <ccmm:description> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:location> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:funding_reference> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:related_resource> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:distribution> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:validation_result> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm:provenance> [0..*]
  • element <ccmm-ap:additional_publication_year> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <ccmm:metadata_identification>

Meaning
property is described by (Inverse relation between dataset and metadata record.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:metadata_record.
Meaning
Metadata Record (Description of the metadata record of the dataset. )

Element <ccmm:identifier>

Meaning
property has identifier (has identifier)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier.
Meaning
Identifier (Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.)

Element <ccmm:version>

Meaning
property version (The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <ccmm:title>

Meaning
property title (A name given to the dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <ccmm:alternate_title>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:alternate_title.
Meaning
Alternate title (Alternate title of the resource.)

Element <ccmm:qualified_relation>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_to_agent_relationship.
Meaning
Resource to agent relationship (An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.)

Element <ccmm:publication_year>

Meaning
property publication year (The year when the item was or will be made publicly available.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:gYear.

Element <ccmm:time_reference>

Meaning
property has time reference (Reference to events related to the dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_reference.
Meaning
Time reference (An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.)

Element <ccmm:resource_type>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_type.
Meaning
Resource type (Type of the resource.)

Element <ccmm:primary_language>

Meaning
property has other language (Any other languages of the Dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:language_system.
Meaning
Language system (A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.)

Element <ccmm:other_language>

Meaning
property has other language (Any other languages of the Dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:language_system.
Meaning
Language system (A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.)

Element <ccmm:terms_of_use>

Meaning
property has terms of use
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:terms_of_use.
Meaning
Terms of use (Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage of dataset. )

Element <ccmm:subject>

Meaning
property has subject (Dataset described using a subject.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:subject.
Meaning
Subject (Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.)

Element <ccmm:description>

Meaning
property has description (Relation to the description of a dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:description.
Meaning
Description (All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories. May be used for technical information or detailed information associated with a scientific instrument.)

Element <ccmm:location>

Meaning
property has location (The geographical area covered by the dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:location.
Meaning
Location (Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource. )

Element <ccmm:funding_reference>

Meaning
property has funding reference (Has reference for funding of a dataset acquisition.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:funding_reference.
Meaning
Funding reference (Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.)

Element <ccmm:related_resource>

Meaning
property has related resource (Reference to the resource in any way related to the described dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:related_resource.
Meaning
Related resource (Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset. )

Element <ccmm:distribution>

Meaning
property has distribution (An available Distribution for the Dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution.

Element <ccmm:validation_result>

Meaning
property has validation result (Reference to the report about the dataset validation.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:validation_result.
Meaning
Validation result (Class describing the result of validation testing. It may include validation of metadata, data and/or web services accessing the data.)

Element <ccmm:provenance>

Meaning
property has provenance (A statement about the lineage of a Dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:provenance_statement.
Meaning
Provenance Statement (Information about entities, activities, and people involved in producing a piece of data or thing.)

Element <ccmm-ap:additional_publication_year>

Meaning
property publication year (The year when the item was or will be made publicly available.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:gYear.

Data structure specification for Related resource

Data structure for Related resource. Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset.

JSON structure for Related resource

IRI
/related-resource/schema.json
Defined in
../related-resource/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Related resource

Description Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset.
Interpretation Related resource
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Related resource"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Related resource"
  • identifier: (has identifier) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • title: (title) optional item of type string
  • alternate_title: (has alternate title) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • resource_url: (resource URL) optional item of type string (format: iri)
  • qualified_relation: (qualified relation) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • time_reference: (has time reference) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • resource_type: (has resource type) optional item of type according to
  • resource_relation_type: (has resource relation type) optional item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Related resource, which is defined in the file ../related-resource/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../identifier/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../alternate-title/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-reference/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-type/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-relation-type/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element related_resource
  • complex type related_resource

Root element <related_resource>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:related_resource.

Root complex type related_resource

Meaning
Related resource (Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <identifier> [0..*]
  • element <title> [0..1]
  • element <alternate_title> [0..*]
  • element <resource_url> [0..1]
  • element <qualified_relation> [0..*]
  • element <time_reference> [0..*]
  • element <resource_type> [0..1]
  • element <resource_relation_type> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <identifier>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier.
Meaning
Identifier (Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.)

Element <title>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <alternate_title>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:alternate_title.
Meaning
Alternate title (Alternate title of the resource.)

Element <resource_url>

Meaning
property resource URL (Human readable resolvable URL representing the resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <qualified_relation>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_to_agent_relationship.
Meaning
Resource to agent relationship (An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.)

Element <time_reference>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_reference.
Meaning
Time reference (An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.)

Element <resource_type>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_type.
Meaning
Resource type (Type of the resource.)

Element <resource_relation_type>

Meaning
property has resource relation type (Relation to the relation type between dataset and resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_relation_type.
Meaning
Resource relation type (Type of the relation between the dataset and given resource.)

Data structure specification for Metadata Record

Data structure for Metadata Record. Description of the metadata record of the dataset.

JSON structure for Metadata Record

IRI
/metadata-record/schema.json
Defined in
../metadata-record/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Metadata Record

Description Description of the metadata record of the dataset.
Interpretation Metadata Record
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Katalogizační záznam"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Katalogizační záznam"
  • language: (language) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • qualified_relation: () required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • date_updated: (date updated) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string (format: date)
  • date_created: (date created) optional item of type string (format: date)
  • conforms_to_standard: (conforms to standard) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • original_repository: (has original repository) required item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Metadata Record, which is defined in the file ../metadata-record/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../language-system/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../resource-to-agent-relationship/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../application-profile/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../repository/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element metadata_record
  • complex type metadata_record

Root element <metadata_record>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:metadata_record.

Root complex type metadata_record

Meaning
Metadata Record (Description of the metadata record of the dataset. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <language> [0..*]
  • element <qualified_relation> [1..*]
  • element <date_updated> [0..*]
  • element <date_created> [0..1]
  • element <conforms_to_standard> [1..*]
  • element <original_repository> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <language>

Meaning
property language (A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions of the metadata record.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:language_system.
Meaning
Language system (A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication, e.g. a language.)

Element <qualified_relation>

Meaning
property (Link to a description of a relationship between metadata record and agent with the specification of the role of agent in this relationship.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_to_agent_relationship.
Meaning
Resource to agent relationship (An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.)

Element <date_updated>

Meaning
property date updated (Date on which the resource was changed.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:date.

Element <date_created>

Meaning
property date created (The date on which the metadata record was created.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:date.

Element <conforms_to_standard>

Meaning
property conforms to standard (An established standard to which the metadata record conforms.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:application_profile.
Meaning
Application profile (A standard or other specification to which a metadata record conforms.)

Element <original_repository>

Meaning
property has original repository (Link to the repository in which the metadata were originally stored and curated.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:repository.
Meaning
Repository (A catalogue or repository that hosts the Datasets or Data Services being described.)

Data structure specification for Time representation

Data structure for Time representation. Representation of time reference as a temporal interval or instant on which something relevant to the resource has happened.

JSON structure for Time representation

IRI
/time-representation/schema.json
Defined in
../time-representation/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is at least one of the following (anyOf):
  • according to
  • according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Time representation, which is defined in the file ../time-representation/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-interval/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-instant/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element time_representation
  • complex type time_representation

Root element <time_representation>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_representation.

Root complex type time_representation

Content - choice of one element from the set
  • element <time_interval> [1..1]
  • element <time_instant> [1..1]

Element <time_interval>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_interval.
Meaning
Time interval (A temporal entity with an extent or duration)

Element <time_instant>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_instant.
Meaning
Time instant (A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.)

Data structure specification for Description

Data structure for Description. All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories. May be used for technical information or detailed information associated with a scientific instrument.

JSON structure for Description

IRI
/description/schema.json
Defined in
../description/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Description

Description All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories. May be used for technical information or detailed information associated with a scientific instrument.
Interpretation Description
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Description"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Description"
  • description_text: (description text) required item of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • description_type: (has description type) optional item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Description, which is defined in the file ../description/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../description-type/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element description
  • complex type description

Root element <description>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:description.

Root complex type description

Meaning
Description (All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories. May be used for technical information or detailed information associated with a scientific instrument.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <description_text> [1..1]
  • element <description_type> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <description_text>

Meaning
property description text (Text describing the resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <description_type>

Meaning
property has description type (Relation to the type of the description.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:description_type.
Meaning
Description type (The type of the description.)

Data structure specification for Checksum

Data structure for Checksum. A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.

JSON structure for Checksum

IRI
/checksum/schema.json
Defined in
../checksum/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Checksum

Description A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.
Interpretation Checksum
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Checksum"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Checksum"
  • checksum_value: (checksum value) required item of type string
  • algorithm: (uses algorithm) required item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Checksum, which is defined in the file ../checksum/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../checksum-algorithm/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element checksum
  • complex type checksum

Root element <checksum>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:checksum.

Root complex type checksum

Meaning
Checksum (A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <checksum_value> [1..1]
  • element <algorithm> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <checksum_value>

Meaning
property checksum value (A lower case hexadecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm. )
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:hexBinary.

Element <algorithm>

Meaning
property uses algorithm (The algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:checksum_algorithm.
Meaning
Checksum algorithm (Algorithm used for Checksums.)

2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Object Description type

Description The type of the description.
Interpretation Description type
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Description type"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Description type"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Alternate title

Description Alternate title of the resource.

object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Alternate title"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Alternate title"
  • title: (title) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • alternate_title_type: (has alternate title type) optional item of type according to

property title (A human-readable name for the subject.)

Data structure specification for Subject

Data structure for Subject. Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.

JSON structure for Subject

IRI
/subject/schema.json
Defined in
../subject/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Subject

Description Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.
Interpretation Subject
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Subject"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Subject"
  • title: (title) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
  • definition: (definition) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • cs: optional item of type string
    • en: optional item of type string
  • classification_code: (classification code) optional item of type string
  • subject_scheme: (in subject scheme) optional item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Subject, which is defined in the file ../subject/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../subject-scheme/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element subject
  • complex type subject

Root element <subject>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:subject.

Root complex type subject

Meaning
Subject (Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <title> [1..*]
  • element <definition> [0..*]
  • element <classification_code> [0..1]
  • element <subject_scheme> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <title>

Meaning
property title (Title of the subject.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <definition>

Meaning
property definition (Definition of the subject in the given context.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Element <classification_code>

Meaning
property classification code (The classification code used for notation of the subject term in the subject scheme.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <subject_scheme>

Meaning
property in subject scheme (Belonging of the subject to the subject scheme.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:subject_scheme.
Meaning
Subject scheme (Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.)

Object Resource type

  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Resource type"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Resource type"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Resource type, which is defined in the file ../resource-type/schema.xsd.

https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

  • element resource_type

Root element <resource_type>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:resource_type.

Root complex type resource_type

Meaning
Resource type (Type of the resource.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of the resource type.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Object Location relation type

object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):

    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Location relation type"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Data structure specification for Time interval

Data structure for Time interval. A temporal entity with an extent or duration

JSON structure for Time interval

IRI
/time-interval/schema.json
Defined in
../time-interval/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Time interval

Description A temporal entity with an extent or duration
Interpretation Time interval
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Time interval"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Time interval"
  • beginning: (has beginning) required item of type according to
  • end: (has end) required item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Time interval, which is defined in the file ../time-interval/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../time-instant/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element time_interval
  • complex type time_interval

Root element <time_interval>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_interval.

Root complex type time_interval

Meaning
Time interval (A temporal entity with an extent or duration)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <beginning> [1..1]
  • element <end> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <beginning>

Meaning
property has beginning (Time instant representing the beginning of a temporal interval.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_instant.
Meaning
Time instant (A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.)

Element <end>

Meaning
property has end (Time instant representing the end of a temporal interval.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_instant.
Meaning
Time instant (A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.)

Data structure specification for Time instant

Data structure for Time instant. A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.

JSON structure for Time instant

IRI
/time-instant/schema.json
Defined in
../time-instant/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Time instant

Description A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.
Interpretation Time instant
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Time instant"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Time instant"
exactly one of the following (oneOf):
  • object with properties (properties):
    • date_time: required item of type string (format: date-time)
  • object with properties (properties):
    • date: required item of type string (format: date)

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Time instant, which is defined in the file ../time-instant/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Nothing is imported.

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element time_instant
  • complex type time_instant

Root element <time_instant>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:time_instant.

Root complex type time_instant

Meaning
Time instant (A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • choice of one item [1..1]
      • element <date_time> [1..1]
      • element <date> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <date_time>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:dateTime.

Element <date>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:date.

Data structure specification for Person

Data structure for Person. Physical person.

JSON structure for Person

IRI
/person/schema.json
Defined in
../person/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Person

Description Physical person.
Interpretation Person
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Person"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Person"
  • identifier: (has identifier) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • name: (name) required item of type string
  • given_name: (given name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • family_name: (family name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • contact_point: (has contact point) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • affiliation: (has affiliation) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Person, which is defined in the file ../person/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../identifier/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../contact-details/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../organization/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element person
  • complex type person

Root element <person>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:person.

Root complex type person

Meaning
Person (Physical person. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <identifier> [0..*]
  • element <name> [1..1]
  • element <given_name> [0..*]
  • element <family_name> [0..*]
  • element <contact_point> [0..*]
  • element <affiliation> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <identifier>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:identifier.
Meaning
Identifier (Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.)

Element <name>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <given_name>

Meaning
property given name (The given name associated with the person.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <family_name>

Meaning
property family name (The family name associated with the person.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <contact_point>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:contact_details.
Meaning
Contact details (Details to contact the agent in a relationship to the resource.)

Element <affiliation>

Meaning
property has affiliation (Affiliation of the person to an organization.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:organization.
Meaning
Organization (Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures. )

object with properties (properties):

    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string
