Data structure specification for Funding reference

Data structure for Funding reference. Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.

JSON structure for Funding reference

IRI
/funding-reference/schema.json
Defined in
../funding-reference/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Funding reference

Description Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.
Interpretation Funding reference
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Funding reference"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Funding reference"
  • local_identifier: (local identifier) optional item of type string
  • award_title: (award title) optional item of type string
  • funding_program: (funding program) optional item of type string (format: iri)
  • funder: (has funder) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type at least one of the following (anyOf):
    • according to
    • according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Funding reference, which is defined in the file ../funding-reference/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../agent/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element funding_reference
  • complex type funding_reference

Root element <funding_reference>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:funding_reference.

Root complex type funding_reference

Meaning
Funding reference (Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <local_identifier> [0..1]
  • element <award_title> [0..1]
  • element <funding_program> [0..1]
  • element <funder> [1..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <local_identifier>

Meaning
property local identifier (The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <award_title>

Meaning
property award title ( The human readable title or name of the award (grant).)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <funding_program>

Meaning
property funding program (Reference to the specific funding program.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <funder>

Meaning
property has funder (Relation to the agent entity of a funder.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:agent.

Data structure specification for Location

Data structure for Location. Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the dataset.

JSON structure for Location

IRI
/location/schema.json
Defined in
../location/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Location

Description Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource.
Interpretation Location
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Location", "GeoLocation"
  • bounding_box: (bounding box) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • name: (name) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type string
  • geometry: (has geometry) optional item of type according to
  • related_object: (has related object) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • relation_type: (has location relation type) required item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Location, which is defined in the file ../location/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../geometry/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../related-resource/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../location-relation-type/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element location
  • complex type location

Root element <location>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:location.

Root complex type location

Meaning
Location (Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <bounding_box> [0..*]
  • element <name> [0..*]
  • element <geometry> [0..1]
  • element <related_object> [0..*]
  • element <relation_type> [1..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <bounding_box>

Meaning
property bounding box (Bounding box of the location geometry.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anySimpleType.

Element <name>

Meaning
property name (Name of the spatial location.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <geometry>

Meaning
property has geometry (The corresponding geometry for a resource.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:geometry.
Meaning
Geometry (The Geometry class provides the means to identify a location as a point, line, polygon, etc. expressed using coordinates in some coordinate reference system.)

Element <related_object>

Meaning
property has related object (Relation to the spatial object.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:related_resource.
Meaning
Related resource (Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset. )

Element <relation_type>

Meaning
property has location relation type (Relation of the location to the dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:relation_type.
Meaning
Location relation type (Relation of the dataset to the resource.)

Data structure specification for Distribution - downloadable file

Data structure for Distribution - downloadable file. Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.

JSON structure for Distribution - downloadable file

IRI
/distribution-downloadable-file/schema.json
Defined in
../distribution-downloadable-file/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Distribution - downloadable file

Description Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.
Interpretation Distribution - downloadable file
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Distribution - downloadable file"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Distribution - downloadable file"
  • title: (title) required item of type string
  • access_url: (access URL) required item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • download_url: (download URL) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • conforms_to_schema: (conforms to schema) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • format: (has format) required item of type according to
  • media_type: (media type) optional item of type according to
  • byte_size: (byte size) required item of type number (integer only)
  • checksum: (has checksum) optional item of type according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Distribution - downloadable file, which is defined in the file ../distribution-downloadable-file/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../file/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../application-profile/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../format/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../media-type/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../checksum/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element distribution-downloadable-file
  • complex type distribution_downloadable_file

Root element <distribution-downloadable-file>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution_downloadable_file.

Root complex type distribution_downloadable_file

Meaning
Distribution - downloadable file (Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <title> [1..1]
  • element <access_url> [1..*]
  • element <download_url> [0..*]
  • element <conforms_to_schema> [0..*]
  • element <format> [1..1]
  • element <media_type> [0..1]
  • element <byte_size> [1..1]
  • element <checksum> [0..1]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <title>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <access_url>

Meaning
property access URL (A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:file.
Meaning
File (Digital resource representing collection of data.)

Element <download_url>

Meaning
property download URL (A URL that is a direct link to a downloadable file in a given format.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:file.
Meaning
File (Digital resource representing collection of data.)

Element <conforms_to_schema>

Meaning
property conforms to schema (An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:application_profile.
Meaning
Application profile (A standard or other specification to which a metadata record conforms.)

Element <format>

Meaning
property has format (The file format of the distribution.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:format.
Meaning
Format (Format of downloadable file.)

Element <media_type>

Meaning
property media type (The media type of the distribution as defined by IANA)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:media_type.
Meaning
Media Type (A file format.)

Element <byte_size>

Meaning
property byte size (The size of a Distribution in bytes. )
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:integer.

Element <checksum>

Meaning
property has checksum (A mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a distribution have not changed.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:checksum.
Meaning
Checksum (A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated.)

Data structure specification for Format

Data structure for Format. Format of downloadable file.

JSON structure for Format

IRI
/format/schema.json
Defined in
../format/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Format

Description Format of downloadable file.
Interpretation Format
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Format"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Format"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Format, which is defined in the file ../format/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element format
  • complex type format

Root element <format>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:format.

Root complex type format

Meaning
Format (Format of downloadable file.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of format value.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Distribution - data service

Data structure for Distribution - data service. Physical embodiment of the dataset distribution as a particular data service.

JSON structure for Distribution - data service

IRI
/distribution-data-service/schema.json
Defined in
../distribution-data-service/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Distribution - data service

Description Physical embodiment of the dataset distribution as a particular data service.
Interpretation Distribution - data service
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Distribution - data service"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Distribution - data service"
  • title: (title) required item of type string
  • access_service: (has access service) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • conforms_to_specification: (conforms to specification) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • documentation: (has documentation) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type according to
  • description: (description) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • cs: optional item of type string
    • en: optional item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Distribution - data service, which is defined in the file ../distribution-data-service/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../data-service/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../application-profile/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../documentation/schema.xsd
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element distribution-data-service
  • complex type distribution_data_service

Root element <distribution-data-service>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:distribution_data_service.

Root complex type distribution_data_service

Meaning
Distribution - data service (Physical embodiment of the dataset distribution as a particular data service. )
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <title> [1..1]
  • element <access_service> [0..*]
  • element <conforms_to_specification> [0..*]
  • element <documentation> [0..*]
  • element <description> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <title>

Meaning
property
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:string.

Element <access_service>

Meaning
property has access service (A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:data_service.
Meaning
Data Service (A collection of operations that provides access to one or more datasets or data processing functions.)

Element <conforms_to_specification>

Meaning
property conforms to specification (An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:application_profile.
Meaning
Application profile (A standard or other specification to which a metadata record conforms.)

Element <documentation>

Meaning
property has documentation (A page or document about this Distribution.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:documentation.
Meaning
Documentation (A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.)

Element <description>

Meaning
property description (A free-text account of the Distribution.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Validation result

Data structure for Validation result. Class describing the result of validation testing. It may include validation of metadata, data and/or web services accessing the data.

JSON structure for Validation result

IRI
/validation-result/schema.json
Defined in
../validation-result/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is

Object Validation result

Description Class describing the result of validation testing. It may include validation of metadata, data and/or web services accessing the data.
Interpretation Validation result
object with properties (properties):
  • id: required item of type string (format: iri)
  • type: required item of type exactly one of the following (oneOf):
    • constant value "Validation result"
    • array of values {0..*} of type string and must contain: "Validation result"
  • label: (label) optional item of type array of values {0..*} of type object with properties (properties):
    • @value: required item of type string
    • @language: required item of type string

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Validation result, which is defined in the file ../validation-result/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
xml http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element validation_result
  • complex type validation_result

Root element <validation_result>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:validation_result.

Root complex type validation_result

Meaning
Validation result (Class describing the result of validation testing. It may include validation of metadata, data and/or web services accessing the data.)
Content - elements in this order
  • element <iri> [1..1]
  • element <label> [0..*]

Element <iri>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type xs:anyURI.

Element <label>

Meaning
property label (Label of the validation result.)
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
0..*
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type .

Data structure specification for Agent

Data structure for Agent. Any entity carrying out actions with respect to the entities Catalogue and the Catalogued Resources.

JSON structure for Agent

IRI
/agent/schema.json
Defined in
../agent/schema.json
Language version used
2020-12 (metaschema IRI: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema)

Root

The root of the JSON schema is at least one of the following (anyOf):
  • according to
  • according to

Overview of XML Structure

This section describes the XSD capturing the structure for Agent, which is defined in the file ../agent/schema.xsd.

Defined in namespace
https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 (preferred prefix: ccmm)

Imports

List of schemas that are imported and used by this schema.

Prefix Namespace Schema Location Documentation
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../organization/schema.xsd
ccmm https://schema.ccmm.cz/research-data/1.1 ../person/schema.xsd

Root Entities of the XSD Schema

  • element agent
  • complex type agent

Root element <agent>

Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:agent.

Root complex type agent

Content - choice of one element from the set
  • element <organization> [1..1]
  • element <person> [1..1]

Element <organization>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:organization.
Meaning
Organization (Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures. )

Element <person>

Meaning
Effective cardinality of the element relative to its parent element
1..1
Parent element
Element type
Content
The content of the element is of type ccmm:person.
Meaning
Person (Physical person. )

Used prefixes

PrefixNamespace IRI
dctermshttp://purl.org/dc/terms/
dcat-aphttps://mff-uk.github.io/specifications/dcat-ap#
dcat-daphttps://mff-uk.github.io/specifications/dcat-dap#
rdfshttp://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
rdfhttp://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#
locnhttp://www.w3.org/ns/locn#
xsdhttp://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#
foafhttp://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/
dcathttp://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#
skoshttp://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
spdxhttp://spdx.org/rdf/terms#
vcardhttp://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#
admshttp://www.w3.org/ns/adms#
provhttp://www.w3.org/ns/prov#
timehttp://www.w3.org/2006/time#
